28 #ifndef CPP_CORE_TYPES_H
29 #define CPP_CORE_TYPES_H
30 
31 #include <string>
32 #include <vector>
33 #include <map>
34 #include <set>
35 #include <list>
36 
37 #include <boost/shared_ptr.hpp>
38 
39 namespace ros {
40 
41 typedef std::vector<std::pair<std::string, std::string> > VP_string;
42 typedef std::vector<std::string> V_string;
43 typedef std::set<std::string> S_string;
44 typedef std::map<std::string, std::string> M_string;
45 typedef std::pair<std::string, std::string> StringPair;
46 
47 typedef boost::shared_ptr<M_string> M_stringPtr;
48 
49 }
50 
51 #endif // CPP_CORE_TYPES_H
